@everyone STATE OF THE ECONOMY REPORT - Q2 2023

Our latest Economic Quarterly Report covers the liberalization of the Star Atlas player-driven resource economy, a critical step towards the future of player-owned, and player-driven digital economies.

Find the full report here   https://staratlas.com/newsroom/economic-reports?utm_medium=community
